headline: New Book Claims Bill Gates Was Banned From Being Alone With Interns At Microsoft
summary: A new book reveals that Bill Gates was allegedly not allowed to be alone with young interns at Microsoft.

headline: Elon Musk's FSD Update, Uber Ties Up With Tesla Rival, Lucid Readying For Gravity Launch And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: Electric-vehicle stocks came under selling pressure in the week ended Aug. 2 amid the broader market meltdown.

headline: 'Warren Crushed Apple' Says Jim Cramer As Buffett Cuts Stake In Tech Giant By Nearly Half: Here's How Much Dividend Income Berkshire Forgoes
summary: Apple continues to be Berkshire's top holding but the successive selling in shares show Buffett's appetite for the tech giant is waning.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Tesla, Microsoft, Intel, CrowdStrike And Crypto Trader Says Dogecoin's Bull Run Has 'Not Even Begun Yet'
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: World Billionaires Lose $134B In Friday Market Slump, Jeff Bezos And Elon Musk Take The Biggest Hits
summary: Amazon.com Inc's lower-than-expected net sales for the second quarter and disappointing outlook weighed heavily on the company's share price on Friday, and also on its founder Jeff Bezos' net worth. This slump was part of a larger financial hit that erased $134 billion from the wealth of the globe's 500 richest individuals.

headline: Tesla Says It Can Make One Powerwall 3 Every 25 Seconds: CEO Elon Musk Terms It 'A Great Product'
Elon Musk Vows To Investigate Tesla's Lawsuit Against EVject In Response To Female Driver's Safety Concerns At Charging Stations
summary: Tesla Inc CEO Elon Musk assured a female customer on Friday that he would investigate the EV giant's lawsuit against EVject, a company that makes a 'breakaway' charging connector for Tesla EV drivers.

headline: Turkey Blocks Instagram After Ankara's Communications Director Accuses Meta Of Preventing Condolences Messages For Hamas Leader Haniyeh
summary: Turkey has banned Meta Platforms Inc.'s Instagram over the platform's alleged non-compliance with the country's laws, following claims that Instagram was suppressing condolence messages related to the assassination of Ismail Haniyeh, the head of Hamas.

headline: Donald Trump Says Mark Zuckerberg Called Him After The Assassination Attempt And 'Announced He's Not Gonna Support A Democrat…Because He Respected Me For What I Did That Day' — And Google Could Be 'Shutdown' By Congress
summary: Donald Trump stated that Meta Platforms Inc. CEO Mark Zuckerberg told him he will not be endorsing a Democrat in the 2024 election after the assassination attempt on Trump.

headline: Tesla Investor Sawyer Merritt Says This Can Help EV Giant 'Reduce Their Own Costs Between 15%-30%:' Elon Musk Calls It '...A Major Breakthrough'
summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk on Friday termed the use of dry cathode 4680 cells in the company's stainless steel Cybertruck a "major breakthrough" capable of major cost reduction to the company.

headline: Elon Musk Says Real-Time Data From X, Tesla Cars, And Optimus Robots In Future Will Make Grok 'Best AI System In The World'
summary: Elon Musk predicts Grok as top AI system using data from X, Tesla, and Optimus robots. Efficient use of training compute & inference is key with human talent. xAI secured $6B in funding, trains Memphis Supercluster with Nvidia H100 GPUs.
